title: President Wilson: Your small, intentional actions help UI excel
summary_en: As another academic year draws to a close, UI President Barbara Wilson reflects on your hard work to support student success and have a positive impact on communities. “You have done it with a commitment to access, excellence, and stewardship that defines Iowa. It’s not easy work, and it does not go unnoticed.”
title_cn: President Wilson: Your small, intentional actions help UI excel

title: Stanley Museum of Art debuts poetry installation by UI faculty member Donika Kelly
summary_en: The UI Stanley Museum of Art debuted a new poetry installation as part of its Thresholds series, featuring UI associate professor of English Donika Kelly’s work in the lobby through September. The rotating series highlights Iowa-affiliated poets and invites visitors — and classes — to experience poetry as both visual art and an interactive teaching tool.
title_cn: Stanley Museum of Art debuts poetry installation by UI faculty member Donika Kelly
